message:
chore(gitignore): ignore root-level test_* scratch binaries and sources

Agent reproducer workflows frequently produce compiled test binaries and
their .c/.rs sources at the repo root (test_fts_neither, test_fts_no_option,
test_fts_skip, test_scanf, test_wordexp, etc.) when triaging glibc/FTS/scanf
parity questions. These are one-off scratch and never belong in version
control.

Add three targeted patterns alongside the existing /*.jpeg, /*.jpg, /*.png
"stray files at repo root" block:

  /test_*       — catches extensionless compiled binaries
  /test_*.c     — catches the matching C sources
  /test_*.rs    — catches Rust reproducer sources

Scoped with a leading slash so they only apply at the repo root, leaving
crates/*/tests/test_*.rs and similar legitimate nested test files tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,6 +13,11 @@ Cargo.lock
 /*.jpg
 /*.png
 
+# Root-level agent scratch (ad-hoc reproducers compiled + source alongside)
+/test_*
+/test_*.c
+/test_*.rs
+
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
